1.subject: Set up a new time to follow up on the mail chain issue that we talked about the other day regarding the shipment delay and order tracking
1.body:
Hey John,

You Order has reached.
Your Urban Wellness LLP order has arrived in your city, Click the button below to track your order in real-time. Arriving on Tuesday, November 19th.

2.subject: Fleet pricing follow-up for Northwind Ventures
2.body:
Hi team,

Following up on the fleet pricing options we discussed last week. Could you share the volume discount sheet for 5+ units?

Thanks,
Marcus
Got a minute to discuss the contract?

3.subject: Demo request for the enterprise dashboard
3.body:
Hi,

Would love to see a demo of the enterprise dashboard. Wednesday 2PM PST works for our team. Please include our CTO on the invite.

Best,
Sara
